mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(COMMENT_NO) FROM TBL_COMMUNITY_COMMENT WHERE POST_NO = #{postNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMMUNITY_COMMENT (COMMENT_NO, USER_NO, POST_NO, USER_NICKNAME, COMMENT_CONTENT, POST_DATE) VALUES(SEQ_TBL_COMMUNITY_COMMENT.nextval, #{userNo}, #{postNo}, #{userNickname, #{commentContent}, #{postDate})
mapper.select: SELECT tcp.post_no,tcp.user_no, tcp.post_title, tcp.user_nickname, tcp.post_date, tcp.post_content, tcp.post_view_count, (select count(post_like_no) from tbl_post_like tpl where tpl.post_no = tcp.post_no) as like_count FROM tbl_community_post tcp where tcp.post_no = #{postNo}
